result.stderr:
dotnet-resteaseclientgenerator 1.0.0
Copyright (C) 2026 dotnet-resteaseclientgenerator

  -f, --File                                          Required. The Swagger or
                                                      OpenApi file. Can be
                                                      '.json' or '.raml'.

  -d, --DestinationFolder                             Required. The destination
                                                      folder to place the
                                                      generated C# files.

  -s, --SingleFile                                    (Default: true) Generate
                                                      Single .cs file.

  --ArrayType                                         (Default: Array) The Array
                                                      type to use.

  -n, --Namespace                                     Required. The Namespace to
                                                      use for the generated
                                                      class file(s).

  --UseDateTimeOffset                                 (Default: false) Use
                                                      DateTimeOffset instead of
                                                      DateTime.

  --ApiNamespace                                      (Default: Api) Append this
                                                      namespace for the Api.

  --ModelsNamespace                                   (Default: Models) Append
                                                      this namespace for the
                                                      Models.

  -g, --GenerationType                                (Default: Both) Define
                                                      what should be generated.

  -e, --PreferredEnumType                             (Default: String)
                                                      Preferred Enum Type to
                                                      generate. In case 'enum'
                                                      is selected, enum classes
                                                      are generated if needed.

  -a, --ApiName                                       Required. The base
                                                      FileName of the generated
                                                      .cs files.

  --MethodReturnType                                  (Default: Type) The
                                                      ReturnType to use for the
                                                      methods. For more details
                                                      see
                                                      https://github.com/canton7
                                                      /RestEase#return-types.

  --AppendAsync                                       (Default: true) Append
                                                      Async postfix to all
                                                      methods.

  --MultipartFormDataFileType                         (Default: ByteArray) The
                                                      MultipartFormData FileType
                                                      to use.

  --ApplicationOctetStreamType                        (Default: ByteArray) The
                                                      application/octet-stream
                                                      type to use.

  --GenerateMultipartFormDataExtensionMethods         (Default: true) Generate
                                                      Extension methods for
                                                      MultipartFormData methods.

  --GenerateApplicationOctetStreamExtensionMethods    (Default: true) Generate
                                                      Extension methods for
                                                      ApplicationOctetStream
                                                      methods.

  --GenerateFormUrlEncodedExtensionMethods            (Default: true) Generate
                                                      Extension methods for
                                                      FormUrlEncoded methods.

  --ReturnObjectFromMethod                            (Default: false) Return
                                                      Object from Method when
                                                      Response is defined but no
                                                      Model is specified.

  --PreferredContentType                              (Default: ApplicationJson)
                                                      Preferred Content-Type to
                                                      use when both
                                                      'application/json' and
                                                      'application/xml' are
                                                      defined.

  --ForceContentTypeToApplicationJson                 (Default: false) Always
                                                      use Content-Type
                                                      'application/json', also
                                                      when multiple
                                                      Content-Types are are
                                                      defined.

  --UseOperationIdAsMethodName                        (Default: true) Use the
                                                      OperationId as method
                                                      name, if valid.

  --PreferredSecurityDefinitionType                   (Default: Automatic)
                                                      Preferred
                                                      SecurityDefinition type to
                                                      add to the interface.

  --MakeNonRequiredParametersOptional                 (Default: true) Append '=
                                                      null' to optional
                                                      parameters in the
                                                      interface methods.

  --DefineAllMethodHeadersOnInterface                 (Default: false) Define
                                                      all method-headers on the
                                                      interface.

  --DefineSharedMethodQueryParametersOnInterface      (Default: true) Define all
                                                      shared method query
                                                      parameters on the
                                                      interface.

  --GenerateAndUseModelForAnyOfOrOneOf                (Default: true) Generate
                                                      and use model for 'AnyOf'
                                                      and 'OneOf' return types.

  --PreferredMultipleResponsesType                    (Default: AnyOf) Preferred
                                                      MultipleResponsesType to
                                                      use when multiple
                                                      responses are defined for
                                                      a path.

  --GeneratePrimitivePropertiesAsNullable             (Default: false) Generate
                                                      properties as nullable for
                                                      OpenApi 2.0

  --SupportExtensionXNullable                         (Default: false) Support
                                                      vendor extension
                                                      'x-nullable' to indicate a
                                                      property as nullable for
                                                      OpenApi 2.0

  --help                                              Display this help screen.

  --version                                           Display version
                                                      information.

options.description: The base FileName of the generated .cs files.

The Swagger or OpenApi file. Can be '.json' or '.raml'.
The Namespace to use for the generated class file(s).
Append this namespace for the Api.

The application/octet-stream type to use.
The Array type to use.
Define all method-headers on the interface.

Generate properties as nullable for OpenApi 2.0

Return Object from Method when Response is defined but no Model is specified.
